pages.title: Eight in the Overworld
pages.text: TAIGA scatters eight ores across every overworld biome, generating in the $(6)underground_ores$() step:$(br2)$(item)Karmesine$() — crimson-red, common, surface-facing.$(br)$(item)Ovium$() — pale cream, mid-depth.$(br)$(item)Jauxum$() — yellow, mid-depth.$(br)$(item)Duranite$() — grey, deep.$(br)$(item)Vibranium$() — violet, rare, deep.

pages.title: Overworld (cont.)
pages.text: $(item)Eezo$() — blue-black, rare.$(br)$(item)Basalt$() — dark, scattered.$(br)$(item)Dilithium$() — rare blue crystal-cluster ore; drops $(item)Dilithium Crystals$() instead of an ingot.$(br2)Use standard mining tools at iron-tier or higher — these ores don't require special picks.
